sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73070" key="o)ligo/sitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγόσῑτ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73070.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating little</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moderately,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0496.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
